code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut product = 1
mut i = 0
while i < parts.len()
  match parts.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      product = product * n
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("product=#{product}")
